response: Austin, TX-based Acme Corp, which employs 342 people, reported quarterly revenues of $12.3M (Q1), $14.1M (Q2), $11.8M (Q3), and $16.2M (Q4) for its latest fiscal year, totaling $54.4M in annual revenue. The company also posted an 18% year-over-year growth rate, with Q4 marking its highest quarterly revenue of the period.
